title: Gear Fourth Awakens — Closing Beat
description: Luffy reveals Gear Fourth and overwhelms Doflamingo with a new form built to break the tyrant.
scene: On pages 19–20, Doflamingo, Dressrosa Citizens, Luffy, Trafalgar Law, Trebol move through the final crisis of Dressrosa as the Birdcage and Doflamingo’s rule reach their breaking point.

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: The citizens that will meet their end today shall surely curse you lot with their last breaths.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: If you imbeciles had never stepped foot in dress- Rosa,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: This country would have remained peaceful!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You liar! It was all a facade!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: This country has extreme shades of light and dark...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: The toys of this country were all once humans...

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: Fufufu! Please, the unfortunate are to be found everywhere! There's simply no saving them all! There's too many!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: far too many for a mere pirate passing through. Why the hero- complex!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: All you've managed to be is a thorn in my side !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: You're on the one that's been the pain in my ass!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: And yet you refuse to fall! So I'll shoulder all the responsibility!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I won't let a single person die!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: are the damn thorn in my side.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: we will be on hiatus next issue.We plan to resume publication with the weekly jump #22-23 double issue.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: With all his heart and soul, he breaks through his limits!

summary: This part focuses on gear fourth awakens, keeping the final battle centered on Luffy, Law, Doflamingo, and the people trapped inside the Birdcage.
